module_info.docstring:
Tests for semantic module error handling and logging.

Verifies that the FAISS backend properly handles missing/empty indexes.

functions.name: test_faiss_load_nonexistent_returns_false
functions.docstring: Verify that loading a nonexistent index returns False.

functions.name: test_faiss_empty_has_zero_units
functions.docstring: Verify a fresh backend has no units.

functions.name: test_faiss_get_unit_returns_none_for_missing
functions.docstring: Verify get_unit returns None for missing unit ID.
